motd:
Welcome to the hamburbur mod menu.
 Hamburbur mod menu is a menu created by the developers over at https://github.com/hamburbur-org and is "The tastiest utils mod"
 The hamburbur mod menu is a menu made to overhaul the game into a new experience, not just adding on to it. 

<color=red>I, Zlothy&GORE (and any hamburbur developers) are NOT responsible for any bans when using the menu, using the menu does carry a risk of a ban as it's a modification to the game</color> 

Hope you enjoy using the menu!!! 
Made with <3 by Zlothy&GORE
